race.comment: SILVER SERENADE (4) handy filly unlucky not to have a few more wins on the CV. Back in grade and gripped on late with the 60.5kg for a close-up second over 1100m at Goulburn. Since fitted with a trial win over 750m at Goulburn. Can stalk the good tempo and prove hard to hold out. WINNING EMOTIONS (3) resumes. Jumped in trip and class with a battling seventh over 1300m at Rosehill in Highway grade. Wasn't pushed out when eighth in a recent 750m Goulburn trial. Has a good fresh record and races well at this course and distance. VEREEVA (7) resumes. Just over a month between runs when she worked home well to secure third in the heavy going over 1200m at Nowra in C4 class. Comes back a few levels and will relish the good early tempo. Each way. JUKEBOX FLYER (10) gritty return from the wide draw with a handy on-pace fourth over 1000m at Albury. Claim helps and is among the chances. CURLY BEND (9) in career best form and keep safe from the inside gate.
